appliedUpdates.description: Documented 4H aggregation divergence between Phase 1 clock-aligned (tf_aggregator) and Phase 2 forex-day-aligned (river_adapter)

Documented sweep variation behavior on calibration data: close_gate is the reliable param for demonstrating variation; FVG floor_threshold_pips and displacement atr_multiplier/body_ratio produce no variation on 5-day data

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that Phase 1 stub tests (e.g., tests asserting NotImplementedError on stubs) may be updated when the stub is replaced with a real implementation. Current wording 'do NOT modify or delete' existing Phase 1 test files is overly strict for stub-assertion tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: river-adapter feature necessarily updated 2 stub tests in test_data_layer.py (test_load_bars_raises → test_load_bars_works, test_available_range_raises → test_available_range_works). Worker documented this as a discovered issue. The change was minimal and justified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that validation contract sweep examples (VAL-EVAL-002: FVG floor_threshold_pips, VAL-EVAL-003: displacement atr_multiplier × body_ratio) reference params that don't produce variation on the 5-day calibration dataset. Future assertions should use displacement close_gate for sweep variation examples.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: evaluation-runner-core worker spent significant debugging time (4+ tool calls) discovering that FVG/atr_multiplier don't vary before finding close_gate works. This knowledge gap costs worker time.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In ra-eval-worker skill, update the cache reuse example: FVG.detect() is called 3 times (once per TF: 1m, 5m, 15m), not once globally. The skill currently implies a single FVG call across the entire sweep.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: evaluation-runner-core test_cache_reuse_displacement_sweep asserts FVG=3, displacement=15 (5 steps × 3 TFs). Worker's skillFeedback.suggestedChanges flags this inaccuracy.

rejectedObservations.observation: param_extraction module contains dead helper functions (_load_raw_yaml, _get_raw_primitive_data) and unused yaml/Path imports. Suggested adding dead code convention to AGENTS.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Too granular for shared guidance. Dead code cleanup is a standard code quality concern that doesn't warrant an AGENTS.md entry. The non-blocking issue is captured in the feature review.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skill procedures were followed correctly across all 3 features.
rejectedObservations.reason: No action needed — positive confirmation, not an observation requiring change.
